title: Senior Power Electronics Engineer
responsibilities: Design and develop power electronic converters (DC-DC, AC-DC, Inverters). Work on high-power systems such as chargers, power supplies, and energy systems. Perform circuit simulation using LTSpice, MATLAB, Simetrix. Design transformers, magnetics, and gate driver circuits. Conduct testing, debugging, board bring-up, and RCA of failed units. Perform loss calculation, efficiency improvement, and thermal optimization. Work on EMI/EMC filter design and compliance standards. Validate converters through DPT, switching analysis, and reliability testing. Prepare technical documentation, reports, and test plans. Collaborate with R&D, mechanical, and manufacturing teams.
